name: Arlo Technologies, Inc.
business: Arlo provides advanced home, business, and personal security services through a cloud platform, app-controlled devices, and AI analytics. It sells subscription services (Arlo Secure, Arlo Total Security, Arlo Safe) and smart security devices such as cameras, video doorbells, and home security systems. The company sells through retailers, distributors, wireless carriers, and directly to consumers.
namedSuppliers: Foxconn Cloud Network Technology Singapore Pte. Ltd.

exposures.sentence: Arlo's deep expertise in cloud services, cutting-edge artificial intelligence (AI) and computer vision analytics delivers seamless, smart home security for Arlo users that is easy to setup and engage with every day.

Our highly secure, cloud-based platform provides users with visibility, insight and a powerful means to help protect and connect in real-time with the people and things that matter most all rooted in a commitment to safeguard privacy for our users and their personal data.
At the heart of this innovative subscription service is Arlo's Home Security System, which uses a first-of-its-kind, all-in-one multi-sensor capable of eight different sensing functions.

Arlo is transforming the ways in which people can protect everything that matters to them with advanced home, business, and personal security services that combine a globally scaled cloud platform, advanced monitoring and analytics capabilities, and award-winning app-controlled devices to create a personalized security ecosystem.
We currently serve our users from third-party data center hosting facilities.

Arlo Go 2, released in the second quarter of 2022, is designed for monitoring remote areas, large properties, construction sites, vacation homes, boat or RV slips and hard-to-access areas. Go 2 works with a 4G LTE cellular data plan to provide continuous connectivity and uninterrupted security.

catalysts.event: Partnership agreement with ADT to expand subscriptions and services revenue stream
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we entered into a partnership agreement with ADT, one of the largest security companies in North America. The partnership is designed to leverage ADT's large customer base to expand Arlo's subscriptions and services revenue stream.
